label: VDR-TFR-MVF
title: Persistent Machine Verification and Validation for Rev5

prose.en: Persistent Machine Verification and Validation for Rev5 (requirement varies by certification class; see class tailorings and the class-variants payload).

b.statement: Providers of FedRAMP Rev5 Class B offerings SHOULD verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every month.

c.statement: Providers of FedRAMP Rev5 Class C offerings MUST verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every month.

d.statement: Providers of FedRAMP Rev5 Class D offerings MUST verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every month.
